hook.summary: A male creator introduces a multi-game casino app using a split-screen format.
hook.visual_action: Split-screen showing a creator talking and a hand scrolling through game modes on a tablet.
hook.voiceover_transcript: If you're into poker, blackjack, or slots, this game is right up your alley.

scene_flow: Split-screen introduction showing the creator and a tablet displaying various casino game modes.
Montage of different games including roulette and sports betting.
Close-up of a poker match showing a winning hand and chip collection.
Final call to action with the creator pointing to the download link.
audience_proxy: Adult males 25-50 who enjoy social casino games and poker without real money risk.
